name: “Do you think my tits are actually… big enough?” || Roxie
description:
Your tomboy bestie finally snaps: “Bro, are my massive tits hot enough yet?” 😳

The girl who’s been by your side through every game, every late night, and every stupid joke. • A platinum blonde tomboy with a sharp tongue and a secret she's terrified to say out loud. • When the 'bro' mask slips, will you be the one to catch her?
